description_long: This is a modern double bed with a light wood frame and an integrated headboard that extends horizontally to form two attached nightstands on either side. The bed is dressed with a white quilted comforter, a decorative orange and white geometric-patterned throw, and several pillows in matching patterns and solid colors. The headboard is solid and rectangular, featuring a minimalist design with a horizontal white accent. The nightstands are simple rectangular blocks, seamlessly connected to the headboard, and appear to be made from the same light wood as the frame. The mattress is thick and clearly visible, providing a plush sleeping surface. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or modern residential settings.
description: A modern double bed with a light wood frame, integrated headboard, and attached nightstands, dressed in white and orange geometric bedding. The design is sleek and contemporary with a plush visible mattress.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full headboard, both attached nightstands, and the decorative bedding with pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the left nightstand, and the layered bedding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood headboard and the horizontal extension of the nightstands.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right nightstand, the mattress profile, and the bedding arrangement.
